summary: Executed Priority C backend + frontend regression for routing policies, default policy update, direct/manual analysis mode, one-fallback behavior, and Priority B provider/import/report sanity after routing changes.
action_items: Optional hardening: add validation/guardrails around /app/configs/routing.yaml parsing to avoid startup failure on malformed config.
Optional hardening: align frontend API base handling with strict env-only fail-fast requirement (avoid implicit '/api' default if policy requires strict env config).
critical_code_review_comments: routing_service.load_routing_policies() assumes routing config is always present and valid; malformed YAML can fail startup without graceful error context.
frontend/src/lib/api.js includes fallback '/api' when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is missing; this conflicts with strict fail-fast env policy in platform guidelines.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed target/run records via API tests and UI actions; no manual seed script used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Routing policy options confirmed in Run Detail selector (direct, minimax-reliable, openrouter-reliable, reliable-default). Verified preview text for openrouter-reliable primary/fallback route. Settings default policy save/restore works. Used run id dc71f922-5167-454c-bb34-dbc15bb7e890 for UI regression checks.
rca of the issue: No functional Priority C/Priority B regression failure reproduced. One earlier UI automation failure was due navigation expectation timing during run creation flow, not a consistent product defect.
